name: defun
doc: Define a named function: (defun name (args...) body...).

name: defmacro
doc: Define a macro that rewrites source forms before evaluation.

name: let
doc: Bind variables in parallel for the body: (let ((var val)...) body...).

name: let*
doc: Like LET but each binding sees those that precede it.

name: lambda
doc: Construct an anonymous function: (lambda (args...) body...).

name: if
doc: Two-armed conditional: (if test then [else]).

name: cond
doc: Multi-way conditional: (cond (test body...)...).

name: case
doc: Dispatch on EQL match against a key: (case key (vals body...)...).

name: when
doc: Run body when test is non-nil: (when test body...).

name: unless
doc: Run body when test is nil: (unless test body...).

name: and
doc: Short-circuit logical AND. Returns last value or NIL.

name: or
doc: Short-circuit logical OR. Returns first non-nil value or NIL.

name: not
doc: Logical negation; same as NULL for booleans.

name: car
doc: First element of a cons cell.

name: cdr
doc: Tail (rest) of a cons cell.

name: cons
doc: Construct a cons cell: (cons head tail).

name: list
doc: Build a fresh proper list from its arguments.

name: append
doc: Concatenate lists; the last argument is shared, not copied.

name: mapcar
doc: Map a function over one or more lists, collecting results.

name: reduce
doc: Combine sequence elements with a binary function.

name: loop
doc: Extensible iteration macro with its own clause language.

name: do
doc: General iteration: (do ((var init step)...) (end-test result) body...).

name: dolist
doc: Iterate over a list: (dolist (var list [result]) body...).

name: dotimes
doc: Iterate N times: (dotimes (var count [result]) body...).

name: setf
doc: Generalized assignment to any place: (setf place value).

name: setq
doc: Assign to a variable: (setq var value [var value]...).

name: defparameter
doc: Define or reset a special variable to a value.

name: defvar
doc: Declare a special variable; initialise only if unbound.

name: defclass
doc: Define a CLOS class: (defclass name (supers) (slots) options...).

name: defmethod
doc: Define a method on a generic function.

name: defgeneric
doc: Declare a generic function and its lambda list.

name: make-instance
doc: Construct an instance of a class with initargs.

name: slot-value
doc: Read or SETF a slot by name on a CLOS instance.

name: with-slots
doc: Lexically bind slot names to slot accessors for a body.

name: handler-case
doc: Catch conditions: (handler-case form (type (var) handler)...).

name: handler-bind
doc: Establish handlers for the dynamic extent of forms.

name: restart-case
doc: Establish named restarts that handlers may invoke.

name: error
doc: Signal an error condition; entered the debugger if unhandled.

name: signal
doc: Signal a condition; returns NIL if no handler intervenes.

name: warn
doc: Signal a warning condition.

name: format
doc: Formatted output: (format dest control-string args...).

name: princ
doc: Print an object without escape characters.

name: print
doc: Print an object readably, preceded by a newline.

name: read
doc: Read one S-expression from a stream.

name: eval
doc: Evaluate a form in the null lexical environment.

name: quote
doc: Return its argument unevaluated. Reader: 'x.

name: function
doc: Return the function value of a name. Reader: #'name.

name: funcall
doc: Call a function with the given arguments.

name: apply
doc: Call a function with a final list of arguments spread.

name: push
doc: Cons an item onto the front of a list place.

name: pop
doc: Pop the head of a list place; returns the popped value.

name: assoc
doc: Look up a key in an association list.

name: member
doc: Return the tail of a list starting at the matching element, or NIL.

name: remove
doc: Return a copy of a sequence with matching items elided.

name: remove-if
doc: Remove items where the predicate is true.

name: remove-if-not
doc: Keep items where the predicate is true.

name: sort
doc: Destructively sort a sequence with a comparator.

name: reverse
doc: Return a fresh sequence whose elements are reversed.

name: length
doc: Return the length of a sequence.

name: first
doc: First element of a list (alias for CAR).

name: rest
doc: Tail of a list (alias for CDR).

name: second
doc: Second element of a list.

name: third
doc: Third element of a list.

name: nth
doc: Zero-indexed element of a list: (nth n list).

name: nthcdr
doc: Apply CDR n times to a list.

name: last
doc: Return the last cons cell of a list.

name: butlast
doc: Return a copy of a list omitting the last n elements.

name: null
doc: True if the argument is the empty list NIL.

name: eq
doc: Object identity comparison.

name: eql
doc: Identity for objects, equality for characters and same-type numbers.

name: equal
doc: Recursive structural equality for conses, strings, bit vectors.

name: equalp
doc: Loose equality: case-insensitive strings, numeric coercion, deep arrays.
Numeric sum of all arguments; (+) is 0.
Subtract; (- x) negates, (- x y...) subtracts the rest from x.
Numeric product of all arguments; (*) is 1.
Divide; integers yield ratios, not floored quotients.
Strictly less-than across all arguments.
Non-decreasing across all arguments.
Strictly greater-than across all arguments.
Non-increasing across all arguments.
Numeric equality across all arguments.
True if no two arguments are numerically equal.

name: mod
doc: Modulo of FLOOR division; result has divisor's sign.

name: rem
doc: Remainder of TRUNCATE division; result has dividend's sign.

name: floor
doc: Greatest integer not greater than the quotient.

name: ceiling
doc: Least integer not less than the quotient.

name: round
doc: Round half-to-even to the nearest integer.

name: truncate
doc: Round toward zero.

name: expt
doc: Power: (expt base power).

name: sqrt
doc: Principal square root.

name: abs
doc: Absolute value of a real or magnitude of a complex number.

name: min
doc: Numeric minimum of its arguments.

name: max
doc: Numeric maximum of its arguments.

name: zerop
doc: True if the argument is numerically zero.

name: plusp
doc: True if the argument is strictly positive.

name: minusp
doc: True if the argument is strictly negative.

name: evenp
doc: True if the integer argument is even.

name: oddp
doc: True if the integer argument is odd.

name: numberp
doc: True if the argument is any kind of number.

name: stringp
doc: True if the argument is a string.

name: symbolp
doc: True if the argument is a symbol.

name: consp
doc: True if the argument is a cons cell.

name: listp
doc: True if the argument is a list (cons or NIL).

name: atom
doc: True if the argument is not a cons cell.

name: concatenate
doc: Concatenate sequences into a result of the requested type.

name: string
doc: Coerce its argument to a string.

name: string=
doc: Case-sensitive string equality.

name: string-upcase
doc: Return a fresh upper-case copy of a string.

name: string-downcase
doc: Return a fresh lower-case copy of a string.

name: subseq
doc: Extract a sub-sequence: (subseq seq start [end]).

name: search
doc: Find a sub-sequence in a sequence; returns the index or NIL.

name: position
doc: Return the index of an item in a sequence, or NIL.

name: find
doc: Return the first matching element of a sequence, or NIL.

name: find-if
doc: Return the first element matching a predicate, or NIL.

name: hash-table
doc: Built-in mutable hash-map type.

name: make-hash-table
doc: Construct a hash-table; supports :test, :size, :rehash-* options.

name: gethash
doc: Look up a key in a hash table; returns (values value present-p).

name: remhash
doc: Remove a key from a hash table; returns whether it was present.

name: maphash
doc: Iterate over (key value) pairs of a hash table.

name: aref
doc: Generalised array reference; SETFable.

name: make-array
doc: Construct an array of given dimensions and element type.

name: vector
doc: Build a fresh simple vector from its arguments.

name: elt
doc: Sequence element by index; SETFable.

name: defpackage
doc: Define a package: (defpackage :name (:use ...) (:export ...)).

name: in-package
doc: Make a package the current *PACKAGE* for subsequent forms.

name: export
doc: Mark symbols as external in a package.

name: import
doc: Import symbols from another package into the current one.

name: use-package
doc: Inherit external symbols of another package into the current one.

name: ql:quickload
doc: Quicklisp: load a system, fetching it from a dist if needed.

name: asdf:defsystem
doc: Define an ASDF system (component layout, dependencies, options).

name: ignore-errors
doc: Run body, returning NIL and the condition on error.

name: unwind-protect
doc: Run cleanup forms whether or not the protected form unwinds.

name: values
doc: Return multiple values from a form.

name: multiple-value-bind
doc: Bind variables to the multiple values of a form for a body.

name: multiple-value-list
doc: Collect a form's multiple values into a list.

name: progn
doc: Sequence of forms; returns the last value.

name: prog1
doc: Sequence of forms; returns the first value.

name: prog2
doc: Sequence of forms; returns the second value.

name: block
doc: Named lexical block; exit with RETURN-FROM.

name: return-from
doc: Exit a named BLOCK with a value.

name: return
doc: Return a value from the implicit NIL block.

name: tagbody
doc: Body of go-tags and forms; supports GO.

name: go
doc: Jump to a tag in the enclosing TAGBODY.

name: catch
doc: Establish a dynamic THROW target identified by a tag.

name: throw
doc: Transfer control to the matching CATCH.

name: labels
doc: Define mutually-recursive local functions for the body.

name: flet
doc: Define non-recursive local functions for the body.

name: macrolet
doc: Define local macros visible to the body.

name: symbol-macrolet
doc: Bind symbols to symbol macros for the body.

name: defstruct
doc: Define a structure type with constructor, accessors, and predicate.

name: defconstant
doc: Define a constant variable; redefining is undefined behaviour.

name: declare
doc: Local declaration form (types, optimise, ignore, ...).

name: declaim
doc: Top-level proclamation; affects subsequent compilation.

name: type-of
doc: Return the most specific type name of an object.

name: typep
doc: Test whether an object is of a given type.

name: coerce
doc: Convert an object to the specified type if possible.

name: identity
doc: Return its argument unchanged.

name: complement
doc: Return a function that negates the result of the given predicate.

name: every
doc: True if a predicate holds for every parallel element of sequences.

name: some
doc: Return the first non-nil predicate result across sequences, or NIL.

name: notany
doc: True if a predicate is nil for every parallel element of sequences.

name: notevery
doc: True if a predicate is nil for at least one parallel element.

name: sleep
doc: Pause the current thread for the given number of seconds.

name: trace
doc: Enable call tracing for one or more functions.

name: untrace
doc: Disable call tracing for one or more functions.

name: describe
doc: Print a verbose description of an object to *STANDARD-OUTPUT*.

name: inspect
doc: Interactively explore an object's structure.

name: documentation
doc: Look up the documentation string of a name and doc-type.

name: the
doc: Type assertion: (the type form) — value is declared to satisfy type.

name: check-type
doc: Signal a TYPE-ERROR if a place's value is not of a given type.

name: assert
doc: Signal an error unless a test holds; restartable.

name: incf
doc: Increment a place: (incf place [delta]).

name: decf
doc: Decrement a place: (decf place [delta]).
